description: CAG India audit findings taxonomy for Audit Reports. 18 top-level categories, 452 sub-categories and detail entries. Based on CAG internal classification and ISSAI guidelines. Used in inheritable_audit_metadata.audit_findings_categories[] at SECTION level only. Pipeline aggregates section → chapter → report. INHERITANCE: ADDITIVE BOTTOM-UP. Naming convention: taxonomy_audit_findings_{product_type}.json — each product type that has distinct finding categories gets its own file.
usage_notes: Use the most specific applicable ID (detail or sub_category level), not the parent category. Set ONLY at SECTION level in content_unit.metadata.audit_findings_categories[]. Do NOT set manually at chapter or report level — those are pipeline-computed aggregations. Multiple IDs permitted per section. For accounts_report: use taxonomy_audit_findings_accounts_report.json instead.
